model: MIC IP fusion 9000i (MIC-9502-Z30GVF9), PTZ thermal VGA-9mm 2MP 30x 30Hz, gray
sensor: 1/2.8-type Exmor R CMOS (visible) + uncooled vanadium oxide microbolometer FPA (thermal)

lens.focal_length_mm: 9 (thermal, fixed Athermal); visible 30x optical / 12x digital zoom

field_of_view_deg: 70° x 52° (thermal); visible 2.3° to 64.7° (horizontal, optical zoom range)

power.method: High PoE (95 W) over Ethernet and/or 21-30 VAC (24 VAC nominal)

features: Thermal: uncooled VOx microbolometer FPA, 640x480 VGA, 30Hz
Thermal spectral range 8-14 um, sensitivity <72 mK (NEDT)
1080p starlight visible imager, 30x optical / 12x digital zoom
Intelligent Video Analytics on the edge (visible + thermal)
360 deg continuous pan, 296 deg tilt; 120 deg/s pan, 90 deg/s tilt
IK10 impact rating, Type 6P / IP68 ingress (with mount)
Window wiper and defroster (glass + germanium windows)
Embedded eMMC edge storage (up to ~4 h), ANR, iSCSI / Bosch VRM

frigate.notes: Bosch official RTSP scheme: /?inst=1 main, /?inst=2 sub (per Bosch 'RTSP usage with Bosch Video IP Devices'). Default admin user is 'service' (no factory default password — set one first). ONVIF Profile S/G (T/M on INTEOX). Not individually bench-tested.

home_assistant.notes: Generic ONVIF integration; Bosch CPP cameras are ONVIF Profile S/G compliant. Use the 'service' account.

blue_iris.notes: Bosch — use the ONVIF/RTSP (or 'Bosch') profile; default admin user is 'service'.
